Techno Brain Earns Back-to-Back Great Place To Work® Certification for 2025, Clinches Top Spot for Gen-Z Engagement
November 14, 2025

Nairobi, Kenya – November 14, 2025 – Techno Brain, a global leader in IT and business solutions, has once again been named a Great Place To Work® Certified™ organization for 2025, cementing its reputation for building people-first workplace cultures. This prestigious recognition, awarded by the global authority on workplace culture—Great Place To Work—is a direct reflection of Techno Brain’s employee-centered ethos and its commitment to fostering innovation, inclusivity, and purpose-driven growth.

The certification, based solely on direct employee feedback, signals strong trust, engagement, and a sense of belonging across Techno Brain’s diverse global teams. From robust mentorship programs that accelerate professional growth to inclusive leadership practices, Techno Brain continues to redefine what it means to be a great place to work in the digital age.

In a double win, Techno Brain Group also took home the Great Place To Work® Victor Libabo Award for Best Workplaces for Gen-Z. This significant recognition highlights the company’s intentional efforts to provide its younger employees with purpose-driven projects, a strong voice in decision-making, and meaningful career pathways at a time when Gen-Z is actively reshaping the modern workforce.

“Creating a workplace where every employee feels valued, heard, and empowered is at the core of our mission. This recognition not only honors our culture but reinforces our responsibility to lead with empathy, equity, and innovation,” said Nelly Maluki, Senior HR Business Partner.

According to Sarah Lewis-Kulin, Vice President of Global Recognition at Great Place To Work®, “Great Place To Work Certification™ is a highly coveted achievement that requires consistent and intentional dedication to the overall employee experience. Organizations with this recognition consistently demonstrate growth and high employee satisfaction.”

This culture of excellence, driven by highly engaged employees, further aligns with Techno Brain’s larger mission: to use cutting-edge technology to uplift communities, support governments, and enable businesses across Africa and globally to grow sustainably.
